notes: Full enum case qualification is `EnumType::case(payload?)`. This is static enum case injection, not constructor-domain `Type!(...)`.

Named declarations use only the owner-appropriate current introducers def, def#async, def#pure, def#guard, def#entry, def#entry#async, def#mut, def#consume, and def#cleanup. The `def#unsafe` spelling exists only inside the separately Preview-gated C FFI surface and is not a general current introducer. The tail-recursion source kind is removed; recursion is ordinary function semantics.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Function signature exactness. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.

Stable scope#static function-body activation runs once per exact CallableImplementationId and normalized specialization at the first actual invocation, after argument/default staging and before parameter ownership commit. The body is caller-input-free, pure, synchronous, authority/resource-free, and activation-dependency-free. One winner publishes Ready or one cached Failed identity with release/acquire; there is no retry, reset, deadlock, or undefined reentry. Top-level static def remains rejected; static values and effectful/module/class activation remain separate Preview families. Product execution remains NOT_RUN.

display_name: Function type variance law Phase A
notes: Function parameter/result variance plus throws/effects subsumption and call-mode exactness.

Every DataClassDecl normalizes to class_disposition=final and is non-subclassable even though the `final` keyword is implicit. An eligible data class automatically receives exactly one generated ConstructionRow when all promoted fields are let, and it has no custom root constructor, mutable/resource field, effectful or throwing default, hidden invariant, or nontrivial super initialization. It never receives an automatic ProjectionRow; ineligible types use their explicit constructor. No opt-in syntax is required.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Generator expression Phase A. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Generic invariance default law. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Design seed for generic target extension sets. Phase A named extension set remains exact nominal target only.
Minimum generic parameter and type argument model required by current Deeplus responsibility types.

Current trace-bounded responsibility for Generic abstraction as responsibility-preserving quantification. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Defines when C<A> to C<B> is admissible under variance, ownership, mutation, cleanup, and region laws.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Generic variance descriptor Phase A. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.

display_name: Generic variance Phase B trait-only surface
notes: Current trace-bounded responsibility for Generic variance Phase B trait-only surface. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
The current grammar projection records activation per alternative so an ordinary parent cannot silently activate a gated or nonactivatable child.
Single-feature production metadata must match canonical feature source_activation.
Current contract: Grammar projection closure. This row grants no hidden source activation, authority, or product implementation claim beyond the stated status and companion rules.
Every grammar production is classified as root_connected, side_slice, or external_projection.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Grapheme text model. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
A finite explicit member list expands left-to-right; wildcard, rename, hidden witness creation and collision are forbidden. Product execution remains NOT_RUN.
#guard includes the pure behavior law and additionally requires Bool result, non-consuming parameters/captures, no mutation, no external control transfer, and no task/actor/resource obligation.
Guard clauses require Bool, throws Never, effects {}, no suspend, and no control transfer.
Guard chains evaluate left-to-right exactly once before ownership commit or payload evaluation. A false guard performs no payload move, acquisition, effect, failure, or cleanup obligation.
A clause-predicate helper uses the current `def#guard` introducer and satisfies the guard purity, totality, Bool-result, and non-suspension contract.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Guarded control transfer. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Stable transactional guarded let with direct or residual-pattern failure form and one unconditional exit before binding commit. Product implementation NOT_RUN.
trait, throw, and catch are hard keywords; hard keywords used as data member names require the member-only escape.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Header-level cleanup budget surface. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Nominality and identity are distinct. Ordinary objects may carry identity; value classes are nominal and identityless without thereby becoming Plain, Copy, or shareable.
Identity operations require an identity-bearing nominal descriptor. Identity is independent of ownership, shareability, hashability, and copyability.

Current Stable law: standalone @ may denote the unique lambda parameter only in expected one-parameter function context; explicit parameter mixing, missing expected arity, and nested ambiguity remain diagnostics.
Overload shape filtering first selects one expected callable; only then is the implicit @ body checked exactly once. Body inference may not participate in a cyclic overload ranking loop.
Implicit reuse is admitted only for Plain values or explicit Shared handles; owners, resources, borrows, and authorities require their explicit responsibility operations.

Slice i..j has an inclusive end and both bounds are required; use ^/$ for first/last coordinates. Explicit-exclusive i..<j is admitted with SLICE_HALF_OPEN_RANGE_NONCANONICAL. SliceRange owns the delimiter; ..., ..>, omitted bounds, and step/descending syntax are not current.

Built-in List/String/Bytes expose 1..length; every ReadonlyView preserves its source owner's domain, including bounded or selected coordinates. Bounded lists preserve L..U, Maps require exact K, tuples use .1 ordinals, Records use labels, and NumericArray uses separate typed one-based axes. Floating-point, truthiness, hidden narrowing, negative-from-end rewriting, and conformance-activated [] are forbidden.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Inline refinement type annotation. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
